name: ccraft-studio
description: An app for creating apps or to code easily for Minecraft ComputerCraft Mod

scripts.dev: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && concurrently -n vite,tsc,electron "vite" "tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --watch" "sleep 2 && electron . --dev"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && electron . --dev
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:preload && npm run build:renderer

author: Mohamed Mahmodi
